/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libTitanPhysicsEngine.so -o libTitanPhysicsEngine.so CMakeFiles/TitanPhysicsEngine.dir/src/guidance/TargetApoapsisGuidance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TitanPhysicsEngine.dir/src/integrators/EulerIntegrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TitanPhysicsEngine.dir/src/integrators/RK4Integrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TitanPhysicsEngine.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TitanPhysicsEngine.dir/src/orbital/OrbitalMechanics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TitanPhysicsEngine.dir/src/physics/AtmosphereModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TitanPhysicsEngine.dir/src/physics/GravityModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TitanPhysicsEngine.dir/src/simulation/LaunchVehicle2D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TitanPhysicsEngine.dir/src/simulation/Rocket1D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TitanPhysicsEngine.dir/src/simulation/Rocket2D.cpp.o
